package.name: seg_pipeline
package.description: Online RGB-D semantic segmentation node for SCovox. Synchronizes a (depth, color) pair, runs an outdoor segmentation model on the color frame, and republishes a colored segmentation image plus re-framed depth/CameraInfo for SCovox's RGB-D semantic-mapping path. The heavy ML runtime deps (torch, transformers) ship in this package's own GPU container (see Dockerfile / README), not via rosdep, so they are not pulled into the SCovox workspace.
